name: gallery
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        google-ai-edge /

      gallery  

    
      A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
summary: 该项目展示并提供了本地运行的设备端机器学习和生成式AI用例，让用户能直接体验和使用本地模型，值得关注因其展示了Google在边缘计算和AI应用的前沿实践。

name: LiteRT-LM
summary: LiteRT-LM 是 Google AI Edge 推出的轻量级实时语言模型推理框架，专为边缘设备优化，值得关注因其高效性能和低延迟特性。

name: newton
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        newton-physics /

      newton  

    
      An open-source, GPU-accelerated physics simulation engine built upon NVIDIA Warp, specifically targeting roboticists and simulation researchers.
summary: Newton 是一个基于 NVIDIA Warp 的开源 GPU 加速物理模拟引擎，专为机器人学和仿真研究设计，值得关注因其高性能和针对性优化。

name: RedditVideoMakerBot
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        elebumm /

      RedditVideoMakerBot  

    
      Create Reddit Videos with just✨ one command ✨
summary: 这是一个用Python开发的自动化工具，能通过一条命令快速生成Reddit视频，适合内容创作者高效制作社交媒体视频。

name: abhigyanpatwari
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        abhigyanpatwari /

      GitNexus  

    
      GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
summary: GitNexus是一个完全在浏览器中运行的客户端知识图谱生成工具，支持通过GitHub仓库或ZIP文件创建交互式知识图谱，并内置Graph RAG代理，非常适合代码探索。

name: ai-hedge-fund
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        virattt /

      ai-hedge-fund  

    
      An AI Hedge Fund Team
summary: 这是一个用Python实现的AI对冲基金项目，通过人工智能技术进行量化交易和投资决策，值得关注因为它结合了前沿AI技术与金融投资实战。

name: seomachine
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        TheCraigHewitt /

      seomachine  

    
      A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.
summary: 该项目是一个基于Claude的SEO优化工具，专注于帮助企业生成高质量、SEO友好的长篇博客内容，提升搜索排名和受众吸引力，值得关注。

name: personaplex
summary: NVIDIA/personaplex 是一个用于构建和管理个性化AI角色的Python项目，由NVIDIA开发，值得关注因其在个性化AI交互领域的先进技术。
